block.header: takama no para ni kamu dumari ma su sumyemutukamurwoki kamurwoki no mikoto moti te sumyemima no mikoto wo ama tu taka mi kura ni mase te ama tu sirusi no turugi kagami wo sasage moti tamapi te koto poki purugoto ni kotopoki to ipu kotopoki to ipu pa ima no sakapokapi no kotoba no goto si nori tamapi siku sumyera wa ga udu no mi kwo sumyemima no mikoto ko no ama tu taka mi kura ni masi te ama tu pi tugi wo yorodu ti aki no naga aki ni opo ya sima toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapira ke ku sirosi myese to purugoto ni sirosi myesu to ipu koto yosa si maturi tama pite ama tu mi pakari moti te kototwopi si ipane ko no ta ti kusa no kakipa wo mo koto yame te amakuda ri tama pi si wosu kuni ame no sita to ama tu pi tugi sirosi mye su sumyemima no mikoto no mi araka wo ima oku yama no opo kapi wo kapi ni tat eru kwi wo imibe no imi mono wo moti te kiri tori te moto suwe woba yama no kamwi ni maturi te nakara wo moti ide ki te imi suki wo moti te imi basira tate te sumyemima no mikoto no ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to tukuri tukape matur eru midu no mi araka purugoto ni araka to ipu imasi yapune no mikoto ni ama tu kususi ipapi goto wo purugoto ni kususi ipapigoto to ipu moti te koto poki sidume mawosa ku kore no siki masu opo miya dokoro no soko tu ipane no kipa mi sita tu tuna ne purugoto no tugapinapa no tagupi kore wo tunane to ipu papu musi no wazapapi na ku taka ma no para pa awo kumwo no tanabi ku kipa mi ame no ti dari tobu tori no wazapapi na ku pori katame taru pasira keta utubari two madwo no kika pi purugoto ni kikapi to ipu ugwoki naru koto na ku piki yup yeru tuna me no yuru bi tori puk yeru kaya no swoswo ki purugoto ni swoswoki to ipu na ku mi yuka tu pi no saya ki yamye no isusu ki idutusi ki koto na ku tapira ke ku yasurake ku mamori matu ru kamwi no mi na wo mawosa ku yapune kukuti no mikoto ko pa kwi no mitama nari yapune toyo uke pimye no mikoto to ko pa ine no mitama nari yo no kotoba ni uka no mitama to ipu ima no yo ubuya ni sakiki tukasine wo two no pye ni oki mata yone wo moti te yanaka ni tirasu no tagupi nari mi na woba tatape matu rite sumyemima no mikoto no mi yo wo kak ipa ni tok ipa ni mamori matu ri ikasi mi yo no ta rasi mi yo ni ta naga no mi yo to sakipape maturu ni yori te imi tama tukuri ra ga moti yuma pari moti kiywo mapari tukuri tukape matur eru midu no ya saka ni no mi pu ki no i po tu mi sumaru no tama ni akaru nigite purugoto ni nikite to ipu teru nigite wo tuke te imibe no sukune nanigasi ga yowa kata ni putwo dasuki tori kake te koto po ki sidume maturu koto no more oti mu koto woba kamu napo bi no mikoto oponapobi no mikoto kiki napo si mi napo site tapi rake ku yasu rake ku sirosi myese to mawosu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-NMZ-FRM,IP-ADV,NP-OB1,PP-GEN,NP,1@皇親神魯企神魯美之命以弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-NMZ-FRM,7@言壽古語云許上〈止〉保企言壽詞如今壽𨢩之詞宣志久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ARG,13@大八洲豐葦原瑞穗之國乎安國止平久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,15@古語云志呂志女須言寄奉賜比弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,17@磐根木乃立知草乃可伎葉乎毛言止弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,PP-GEN,NP,23@之命乃御殿乎今奧山乃大峽山峽爾立留,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,24@木乎齋部乃齋斧乎以弖伐採弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP-PRD,PP-GEN,NP,30@命乃天之御翳日之御翳止造,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-NMZ-FRM,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,35@護言乎古語云久須志伊波比己止以天言壽鎭白久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-NMZ-FRM,NP,PP-GEN;@2,NP,PP-GEN,NP,PP-GEN,NP,37@大宮地底津磐根乃極美下津綱根古語番鼠之類,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-NMZ-FRM,IP-ADV,NP-SBJ,44@柱桁梁戸牖乃錯比古語云伎加比動鳴事无久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-NMZ-FRM,IP-ADV,NP-SBJ,N,C-N;@2,NP,PP-GEN,NP,47@草乃噪伎古語云藉〈蘇〉蘇伎无久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-NMZ-FRM,48@御床都比乃佐夜伎夜女乃伊須須伎,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,COMMENT,IP-MAT;@4,NP,57@世産屋以辟木束稻置於戸邊乃,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,COMMENT,IP-MAT;@4,NP-PRD,PP-GEN,IP-NMZ,59@散屋中之類也御名乎波稱奉利弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,68@齋玉作等我持齋波利持淨万波利造仕禮留,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,77@齋部宿禰某我弱肩爾太襁取懸弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,NP-SBJ,N,C-N;@2,NP,82@命聞直志見直之弖平久安久,*

sentence.transcription: takama no para ni kamu dumari ma su

sentence.kanji: 皇親神魯企神魯美之命以弖
sentence.transcription: sumyemutukamurwoki kamurwoki no mikoto moti te

sentence.kanji: 命乎天津高御座爾坐弖
sentence.transcription: mikoto wo ama tu taka mi kura ni mase te

sentence.kanji: 言壽古語云許上〈止〉保企言壽詞如今壽𨢩之詞宣志久
sentence.transcription: koto poki purugoto ni kotopoki to ipu kotopoki to ipu pa ima no sakapokapi no kotoba no goto si nori tamapi siku

sentence.kanji: 命此乃天津高御座爾坐弖
sentence.transcription: mikoto ko no ama tu taka mi kura ni masi te
ama tu pi tugi wo yorodu ti aki no

sentence.kanji: 大八洲豐葦原瑞穗之國乎安國止平久
sentence.transcription: opo ya sima toyo asi para no midu po no kuni wo yasu kuni to tapira ke ku

sentence.kanji: 古語云志呂志女須言寄奉賜比弖
sentence.transcription: purugoto ni sirosi myesu to ipu koto yosa si maturi tama pite
ama tu mi pakari moti te kototwopi si

sentence.kanji: 磐根木乃立知草乃可伎葉乎毛言止弖
sentence.transcription: ipane ko no ta ti kusa no kakipa wo mo koto yame te
ama tu pi tugi sirosi mye su

sentence.kanji: 之命乃御殿乎今奧山乃大峽山峽爾立留
sentence.transcription: mikoto no mi araka wo ima oku yama no opo kapi wo kapi ni tat eru

sentence.kanji: 木乎齋部乃齋斧乎以弖伐採弖
sentence.transcription: kwi wo imibe no imi mono wo moti te kiri tori te
moto suwe woba yama no kamwi ni maturi te
nakara wo moti ide ki te

sentence.kanji: 命乃天之御翳日之御翳止造
sentence.transcription: mikoto no ame no mi kage pi no mi kage to tukuri

sentence.kanji: 殿古語云阿良可汝屋船
sentence.transcription: mi araka purugoto ni araka to ipu imasi yapune no

sentence.kanji: 護言乎古語云久須志伊波比己止以天言壽鎭白久
sentence.transcription: ipapi goto wo purugoto ni kususi ipapigoto to ipu moti te koto poki sidume mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 大宮地底津磐根乃極美下津綱根古語番鼠之類
sentence.transcription: opo miya dokoro no soko tu ipane no kipa mi sita tu tuna ne purugoto no tugapinapa no tagupi
kore wo tunane to ipu papu
taka ma no para pa awo kumwo no tanabi ku
kipa mi ame no ti dari tobu

sentence.kanji: 柱桁梁戸牖乃錯比古語云伎加比動鳴事无久
sentence.transcription: pasira keta utubari two madwo no kika pi purugoto ni kikapi to ipu ugwoki naru koto na ku
tuna me no yuru bi tori puk yeru

sentence.kanji: 草乃噪伎古語云藉〈蘇〉蘇伎无久
sentence.transcription: kaya no swoswo ki purugoto ni swoswoki to ipu na ku

sentence.kanji: 御床都比乃佐夜伎夜女乃伊須須伎
sentence.transcription: mi yuka tu pi no saya ki yamye no isusu ki idutusi ki
tapira ke ku yasurake ku mamori matu ru
kamwi no mi na wo mawosa ku

sentence.kanji: 命是木靈也屋船豐宇氣姫
sentence.transcription: mikoto ko pa kwi no mitama nari yapune toyo uke pimye no
ko pa ine no mitama nari
yo no kotoba ni uka no mitama to ipu ima no

sentence.kanji: 世産屋以辟木束稻置於戸邊乃
sentence.transcription: yo ubuya ni sakiki tukasine wo two no pye ni oki

sentence.kanji: 散屋中之類也御名乎波稱奉利弖
sentence.transcription: yanaka ni tirasu no tagupi nari mi na woba tatape matu rite
mikoto no mi yo wo kak ipa ni
tok ipa ni mamori matu ri
mi yo to sakipape maturu ni yori te

sentence.kanji: 齋玉作等我持齋波利持淨万波利造仕禮留
sentence.transcription: imi tama tukuri ra ga moti yuma pari moti kiywo mapari tukuri tukape matur eru
nigite purugoto ni nikite to ipu teru

sentence.kanji: 齋部宿禰某我弱肩爾太襁取懸弖
sentence.transcription: imibe no sukune nanigasi ga yowa kata ni putwo dasuki tori kake te
koto woba kamu napo bi no

sentence.kanji: 命聞直志見直之弖平久安久
sentence.transcription: mikoto kiki napo si mi napo site tapi rake ku yasu rake ku

block.header: koto wakite mawosa ku opomiyanomye no mikoto to mi na wo mawosu koto pa sumyemima no mikoto no onazi opo tono no uti ni sayari masi te mawiri makaduru pito no era bi siro si kamwi tati no isurokopi arebi masu wo koto napo si yapa si purugoto ni yapasi to ipu masi te sumyemima no mikoto no asita no mi ke yupubye no mi ke ni tukape matu ru pire kakuru tomo no wo tasuki kakuru tomo no wo wo te no magapi asi no magapi purugoto ni magapi to ipu nasa sime zusi te mi kwo tati opo kimi tati mapyetugimitati momo no tukasa bito domo wo ono ga muki muki ara sime zu asi ki kokoro kitana ki kokoro na ku miya susume susu me miya tutwome tutwome simyete toga ayamati ara mu woba mi napo si kiki naposi masi te tapi rake ku yasu rake ku tukape matura sime masu ni yori te opomiyanomye no mikoto to mi na wo tatapegoto wope matura ku to mawosu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,N,C-N,NP,8@選比知之神等乃伊須呂許比阿禮比坐乎言直之和之古語云夜波之坐弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,PP-DAT,NP,PP-GEN,NP,10@命朝乃御膳夕乃御膳仕奉留,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,N,C-N;@2,NP,13@伴緒乎手躓足躓古語云麻我比不令爲弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,21@咎過在乎波見直之聞直坐弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,22@平久安久令仕奉坐爾依止〈弖〉,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,IP-ADV,NP,24@命止御名乎稱辭竟奉久止白,*

sentence.transcription: mi na wo mawosu koto pa sumyemima no
opo tono no uti ni sayari masi te

sentence.kanji: 選比知之神等乃伊須呂許比阿禮比坐乎言直之和之古語云夜波之坐弖
sentence.transcription: era bi siro si kamwi tati no isurokopi arebi masu wo koto napo si yapa si purugoto ni yapasi to ipu masi te

sentence.kanji: 命朝乃御膳夕乃御膳仕奉留
sentence.transcription: mikoto no asita no mi ke yupubye no mi ke ni tukape matu ru

sentence.kanji: 伴緒乎手躓足躓古語云麻我比不令爲弖
sentence.transcription: tomo no wo wo te no magapi asi no magapi purugoto ni magapi to ipu nasa sime zusi te
mi kwo tati opo kimi tati mapyetugimitati momo no
tukasa bito domo wo ono ga muki muki ara sime zu

sentence.kanji: 咎過在乎波見直之聞直坐弖
sentence.transcription: toga ayamati ara mu woba mi napo si kiki naposi masi te

sentence.kanji: 平久安久令仕奉坐爾依止〈弖〉
sentence.transcription: tapi rake ku yasu rake ku tukape matura sime masu ni yori te

sentence.kanji: 命止御名乎稱辭竟奉久止白
